# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build Workflow

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      pre_build_command:
        description: "Optional shell command to run before the build"
        required: false
        default: ""
        type: string
      build_command:
        description: "Shell command to run for the build"
        required: true
        default: "npm run build"
        type: string
      post_build_command:
        description: "Optional shell command to run after the build"
        required: false
        default: ""
        type: string

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run pre-build command
        if: ${{ inputs.pre_build_command != '' }}
        shell: bash
        run: ${{ inputs.pre_build_command }}

      - name: Run build command
        shell: bash
        run: ${{ inputs.build_command }}

      - name: Run post-build command
        if: ${{ inputs.post_build_command != '' }}
        shell: bash
        run: ${{ inputs.post_build_command }}
